violations.text: The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment is to indicate which menu items are available raw or undercooked. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the main walk-in cooler, and small prep unit. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2025

The condensate from the ice machine is draining onto the floor of the basement. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain or other method of conveyance. PIC is to send evidence of repair to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
The floor in the kitchen was observed with low grout and cracked tiles and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (pan and utensils) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Pans were sent to dish machine during time of inspection to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Cooked chicken and onion dip were observed past their disposition date. Any prepared food items that are made in the establishment shall be disposed of within 7 days after preparation. Food items were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment is to indicate which menu items are available raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Establishment was observed salt curing Guanciale in the walk-in cooler. Establishment does not have prior approval for specialized process. Establishment shall submit a HACCP plan and get approval from RIDOH Center for Food Protection for specialized process. Food items were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The door to the outside, located on the second floor by the stairs, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Condensation was observed leaking into the low boy portion of the small prep unit and the tubing in the liquor walk-in cooler was observed resting on top of food items. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Tongs were observed stored on the oven handle. Utensils between use shall be stored in one of the following manners: on a dry clean surface, in water of 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more, or in water with sufficient flow to flush particulates to the drain. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Utensils (Pans) in the equipment storage area are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Pans were flipped to have food contact surface down. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the main walk-in cooler, and small prep unit. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2025

The condensate from the ice machine is draining onto the floor of the basement. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain or other method of conveyance. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. An air break was observed. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
The floor in the kitchen was observed with low grout and cracked tiles and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2025

The beer keg delivery door to the outside, located in the basement back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024

The drains from the soda guns and beer taps were observed draining into the rinse bay of the bar 3-bay sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024
